components.name: CLI
components.description: Main entry point for the command-line interface

components.name: CompileCommand
components.description: Command that takes input text or file and outputs blueprint

components.name: ConfigCommand
components.description: Command to set provider, model, etc.

components.name: OutputFormatter
components.description: Formats output in JSON, YAML, markdown

relationships.derived_from: CLI triggers CompileCommand or CorpusCommand or ConfigCommand
CLI triggers CompileCommand or CorpusCommand or ConfigCommand
CLI triggers CompileCommand or CorpusCommand or ConfigCommand

constraints.description: CLI should have compile command, self-compile command, corpus command, and config command
constraints.derived_from: The CLI should have: - compile command (takes input text or file, outputs blueprint) - self-compile command (compiles Motherlabs itself) - corpus command (list/query stored compilations) - config command (set provider, model, etc.)
